title: linum medium var. texanum
intro: Linum medium var. texanum, also known as Texas flax or stiff flax, is a perennial plant that belongs to the genus Linum and is native to North America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help soothe skin irritations and wounds. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, and has been used in traditional medicine to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues. Linum medium var. texanum can be prepared as a herbal remedy in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
